Contact

Get in touch with Carnivore Command Center.

CCC is being built carefully and intentionally. If you want to ask a question, discuss the product, explore a partnership, or reach out for business purposes, use the contact details below.

1

General inquiries

For product questions, website inquiries, collaboration ideas, or early-access related communication, use the primary business contact associated with the project.

Product Partnerships Beta
2

Business contact

Carnivore Command Center is being developed under WDC LLC. For formal business communication, investor-related questions, or strategic conversations, please reach out through the designated business contact channel for the project.

WDC LLC Business Investor
What to contact us about

Reach out for the right reasons, and we’ll keep it simple.

This page is intended to give visitors a clean business-facing contact point while the broader product and app continue to mature.

  • questions about CCC and the product direction
  • beta interest or collaboration opportunities
  • partnership or business development inquiries
  • investor or strategic conversations
  • media, brand, or founder-related outreach
Current stage

CCC is in active product build and validation. Communication may be focused, selective, and prioritized around product execution and strategic fit.

Best use of this page

Use this page as a simple entry point for serious outreach. It is not intended to be a support portal or a broad customer service hub at this stage.

Response expectations

Replies may vary depending on the nature of the inquiry, current build priorities, and whether the conversation aligns with the next phase of the business.

Contact channel

For now, please use the primary business contact method connected to Carnivore Command Center and WDC LLC.

If you already have a direct relationship, continue using the same communication path you have been given.

This page is intended for general business communication and project-related outreach. It does not create a client relationship, investment agreement, or service obligation.

Built Under WDC LLC
Want to understand the product first?

Before reaching out, you can review the product direction, dashboard vision, and current beta progress.
